subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Thou by Whose Name the dove of utterance warbleth her melodies upon the loftiest branches, and the call of the faithful crieth out
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من باسمک غنت حمامه البیان علی اعلی الاغصان و ارتفع ندآء المخلصین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
